name: Joining the waitlist on a full slot shows a position
description: A signed-in member opens a studio and clicks a time slot that is already booked (marked with a waitlist affordance) on the availability light board; the panel then shows that the member is on the waitlist with a numeric position.

planSteps.description: Open the sign in page from the header
Enter the email member@atelier.test into the email field
Enter the password MemberPass#2026 into the password field
Open the first studio in the gallery
On the availability light board, click a time slot that is already booked and shows a waitlist label
Verify the panel shows the text 'You are on the waitlist' and a numeric position value
